footer.note: Full-stack developer, freelancer, and Civil Protection volunteer based in Veneto, Italy.

about.title: Technology, volunteering, and a strong product mindset

paragraphs.one: I'm Andrea Tombolato, a full-stack developer since 2016. At Medas Solutions I work on healthcare software projects with a Java and Node.js stack, building reliable solutions where performance, code quality, and operational continuity truly matter.
paragraphs.two: Alongside my main role I work on small freelance projects under the heyatom brand, contribute to Element Gaming as a board member, and support Civil Protection as public communication lead.
paragraphs.three: Away from the screen, I recharge through mountain hikes, travel, and gaming culture. These experiences shape my design approach too: clean, accessible, grounded, and always people-first.

highlights.experience: {years}+ years across Java, Node.js, Vue, and Nuxt
highlights.focus: Clean architecture, accessibility, and interfaces shaped around real use cases
highlights.community: Across non-profit work, volunteering, and projects designed to generate local impact

timeline.title: Professional journey & community
timeline.description: From 2016 to today: full-stack development in healthcare, non-profit community projects, and local volunteering.

medas.description: Software development in the healthcare domain using Java, Node.js, and Grails. Focus on code quality, performance, and operational continuity.

elementBoard.description: Strategic management of a non-profit gaming community: team coordination, organizational decisions, and initiative development.

elementDev.description: Development and management of technical community projects, from the website to internal tools.

pcsm.description: Active volunteer: managing public communication and information coordination in the local area.

skills.title: Technologies and work areas
skills.description: I work with web technologies based on JavaScript or Java, such as Node.js, Grails, Nest.js, Vue.js and Nuxt.js. Always looking for new technologies to learn, to continuously improve my skills. I also take care of UX and UI, with an emphasis on design and product quality, paying close attention to detail and ease of use.
